text_overlays.content_summary: مبروك الصيام (Congratulations on Ramadan) — main headline in turquoise calligraphy
الطازج — brand name (Al Tazaj) in white script at bottom
طازج إلى الطازج (Fresh to Fresh) — brand tagline

hard_blocks_triggered.evidence_description: Kaaba structure illustrated as primary visual element in commercial Ramadan greeting post for fast food chain. Sacred Islamic imagery (Kaaba, minarets, hajj pilgrims) used as brand promotional backdrop for food/beverage commerce.

cultural_notes.free_notes: Despite strong Ramadan cultural sensitivity in tone and messaging, this image commits a severe compliance violation by positioning the Kaaba and Hajj imagery as decorative branding backdrop for a commercial fast food entity. While the intent appears celebratory and the Arabic calligraphy is respectfully executed, using Islam's holiest site as promotional design for food commerce violates Saudi cultural and religious sensibilities. This would face immediate removal in KSA market compliance review.

pattern_matches.notes: Ramadan greeting with 'Mabrouk al-Siyam' (Congratulations on Fasting)
Seasonal Ramadan cultural moment tie-in with festive orange/gold palette
Islamic heritage elements (Kaaba, minarets, pilgrims) used to connect brand to cultural values
Direct alignment with Ramadan sacred observance period
